title: LETTING GOD INTO OUR LIFE | HG Amitasana Das | GITA LIFE live
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: A warm welcome to all of you for today's Gita Live session.
The topic for the day is, Letting God into our lives.
We have a very very intimate, strong relationship with the Lord.
We are part and parcel of the Supreme Lord.
Just like the limbs of our body, they are a very integral part of the body and in one
sense cannot be separated, nor can they have their independent existence.
So likewise, being part and parcel of the Lord, having a thick relationship with the
We are part and parcel of the Lord.
We are part and parcel of the Lord.
We are part and parcel of the Lord.
We are part and parcel of the Lord.
You know, we should not expect to have that relationship live.
We should have the Lord as our constant companion.
We should feel the Lord being with us, guiding us, directing us, leading us, but that may
not be the present state of our consciousness.
Many a times we are completely forgetful.
faithful of Lord, completely oblivious of His presence in our lives.
So today's session is all about how we can let God into our lives, experience His presence
and have a nice wonderful relationship with Him.

our beloved spiritual master, Lord Shaitanya Mahaprabhu, Lord Shri Krishna and all the
great Acharyas to bless us with the right understanding.
So please, if possible, you can fold your hands and join me in offering these prayers.
Let us chant these prayers together.
